---
title: "Demultiplexing and QC results of paired BAL and PBMC scRNA-seq data"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Data Processing {.tabset}

### Demultiplexing
#### BAL
Demultiplexing results of BAL cells could be found in [this webpage](https://ansontcw.github.io/cf-eti-bal-scrna/).

#### PBMC
- [batch1](01.demux_PP1.html)
- [batch2](01.demux_PP2.html)

### Quality control
#### BAL
- [batch1](02.qc_BP1.html)
- [batch2](02.qc_BP2.html)
- [batch3](02.qc_Pi1.html)
- [batch4](02.qc_capture1.html)

#### PBMC
- [batch1](02.qc_PP1.html)
- [batch2](02.qc_PP2.html)
- [batch3](02.qc_Pcap.html)
